---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Reproduction Steps
Provide steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 💻 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📱 Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## 🖼️ Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 📋 Environment
Please complete the following information:

**Platform:**
- [ ] Web (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
- [ ] Desktop (Windows, macOS, Linux)
- [ ] Mobile (iOS, Android)
- [ ] Console (PlayStation, Xbox, Nintendo Switch)
- [ ] VR/AR (Oculus, Vive, ARKit, ARCore)

**Browser/OS Version:**
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120.0]
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14.0]

**Engine Version:**
- Version: [e.g. 1.0.0]

**Device Specifications:**
- CPU: [e.g. Intel i7-12700K]
- GPU: [e.g. NVIDIA RTX 3080]
- RAM: [e.g. 16GB]
- Other: [e.g. WebGL2 enabled]

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## 🔧 Possible Solution
If you have any ideas on how to fix this, please describe them here.

## 📚 Related Issues
List any related issues or pull requests.

## ✅ Checklist
Please confirm the following:

- [ ] I have read the [contributing guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have searched existing issues for duplicates
- [ ] I have provided enough information for the team to reproduce the issue
- [ ] I have included relevant environment details
- [ ] I have included screenshots if applicable
